summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Recalibrate website launch preparation. All waitlist-to-beta transformation features successfully implemented and functional.

integration_issues.issue: Network error toast appears when submitting email subscription form
integration_issues.note: Form submission works but shows network error - likely backend connectivity issue
